name_cn:
『Celine』
CELI_NE 2022 Spring/Summer Crossbody CABAS Tote Bag Versatile Tote New Small Size | Classic Triomphe Monogram Series Carries well, recommended by bloggers and celebrities | Calfskin + PVC | A fighter for neutral bags, scratch-resistant, lightweight, large capacity, a must-have for fashionistas! No need to worry about looking short, easy to carry out!
Dimensions: 34×12.5×23
